query: MongoDB real-time analytics write throughput 50000 events per second performance 2024
answer: MongoDB supports up to 50,000 events per second for real-time analytics. Its native support for out-of-order inserts enhances low-latency performance. MongoDB Atlas offers efficient real-time analytics capabilities.

results.title: Real-time Data Analytics On MongoDB Atlas
results.snippet: With MongoDB, businesses can analyze any data in place and deliver insights in real time. By combining data from real-time events with historic and reference datasets, organizations can optimize queries to quickly deliver actionable results. ## Building real-time applications with MongoDB’s modern data platform. A diagram showcasing the various data sources used to create real time applications. Real-time data reflects what is happening now. With MongoDB, real-time analytics can be derived from multiple data sources — from basic aggregations to machine learning and AI — and stored separately. * ACID-compliant databases to ensure the ability to react to new data in real time and maintain high data integrity while serving many concurrent queries. Configuring and developing real-time analytics with high productivity — meaning less time wasted mapping data tables or coding single-use data pipelines — means you’re making your data a competitive advantage. * Offers a variety of efficient options for delivering insights to data consumers in real time, including change streams, triggers, and GraphQL.

results.title: MongoDB Atlas 2025: Features Every Developer Should Know
results.snippet: Native support for out-of-order inserts. Great for low-latency applications where you are streaming in 50K events each second or more. 3

results.title: Essential Guide to Real Time Analytics | MongoDB
results.snippet: # What is Real-Time Analytics? ### What does a real-time analytics platform mean? ### What is an example use case of real-time data analytics? ### Why is real-time analytics important? Businesses that use real-time analytics can react more quickly to market changes than those that wait on batch processing reports. ### Who uses real-time analytics? Real-time analytics has moved far beyond a niche tool; it’s now part of how many industries operate day to day. In finance, it powers instant fraud detection and processes the data generated to keep payment systems secure. Retailers use real-time analytics to personalize offers on the fly or replenish inventory before a shortage hits. ### What is the best database for real-time analytics? MongoDB works well when you need to query live application datathrough a real-time OLAP database without moving it into a warehouse first. ### What are the main challenges in implementing real-time analytics?

results.title: MongoDB’s 2024 Year In Review | MongoDB
results.snippet: Announcement: As of 9/26/2025, we are refocusing the MongoDB AI Applications Program (MAAP) to instead focus on fostering and developing strategic partnerships. ### **Delivering customer value with the MongoDB AI Applications Program**. AI applications have become a cornerstone of modern software, and MongoDB is committed to equipping customers with the technology, tools, and support they need to succeed on their AI journey. **Visit the** **MongoDB AI Applications Program** **page or** **watch our session** **from AWS re:Invent to learn more!**. ### **Advancing AI with MongoDB Atlas Vector Search**. **Head over to our** **Atlas Vector Search quick start guide** **to get started with Atlas Vector Search today, or visit our** **AI resources hub** **to learn more about how MongoDB can power AI applications.**. Increasingly, organizations are laser-focused on ensuring that their technology investments directly address critical business challenges and provide clear ROI and competitive advantage—whether it’s optimizing supply chains, delivering hyper-personalized customer experiences, or scaling operations efficiently,” said **Sahir Azam, Chief Product Officer** at MongoDB.
